overview: A full-stack sign language detector that uses your webcam and browser-based machine learning to recognize hand gestures in real time. Includes a structured learning library for alphabets, numbers, and common phrases, plus an interactive practice mode that validates your gestures and tracks your progress.
features: Real-time hand gesture recognition using MediaPipe Hands in the browser
Live webcam feed with detected gesture displayed as large, highlighted text
Learning library with alphabets A-Z, numbers 0-9, and common gestures (Hello, Thank You, etc.)
Practice mode with live feedback — shows 'Match!' or 'Try Again' and marks gestures as learned
User authentication with progress tracking across sessions
Dashboard showing total learned gestures and next recommendations
Dark mode toggle with persistent preference
Fully responsive design for mobile and desktop
